subcodes.first_line: O esteemed daughter of the Kingdom! The letter thou didst send hath been received, and its contents were replete with wondrous meanings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر محترمه ملکوت نامه‌ئی که فرستاده بودی رسید مضمون مشحون بر معانی بدیعه بود
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @prophecy and fulfillment, @universal peace; world unity, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @equality of men and women, @harmony of science and religion
